g.text: Ardalis Clean Architecture Template — .NET 10 / FastEndpoints / CQRS / DDD
No external dependencies — Pure domain logic
1. Client sends HTTP request to FastEndpoint
2. Endpoint validates request (FluentValidation) → dispatches Command/Query via Mediator
3. Handler executes use case using Repository (CQRS) → returns Result<T>
Core has zero external dependencies — all arrows point inward
